note: Positional /shape[N] enumerates ALL shapes on the slide including layout-inherited placeholders — new shapes typically land at the end, not at /shape[1]. `add` echoes the canonical /shape[@id=ID] path; prefer that for follow-up Set/Get. effective.* keys (direction, size, font, color, bold) are read-only inheritance-resolved values walked up the placeholder→layout→master→defaults chain; suppressed when the corresponding direct key is set. Each pairs with effective.*.src naming the writing layer.

size.description: font size — Add/Set forwards to the first run; Get exposes the inheritance-resolved value as effective.size, not bare size.
size.readback: n/a at shape level — read effective.size on the shape, or size on the inner run

evaluated.description: cross-handler protocol flag — emitted on shapes whose body contains an <a:fld> dynamic field (slide number, date-time, footer, etc.). True when every dynamic field has cached text the renderer can show; false when at least one is empty (view text substitutes #OCLI_NOTEVAL!{type}; view issues emits subtype slide_field_not_evaluated). PowerPoint always re-renders fields on open, so there is no cache_stale equivalent. Read this via get --json instead of pattern-matching the sentinel.
evaluated.readback: true|false (true ⇒ all <a:fld> shapes on this node carry display text)

isTitle.description: true when this shape is the slide title placeholder (or a content placeholder configured as title). Always emitted on every shape so query selectors like `shape[isTitle=true]` and `shape[isTitle=false]` resolve uniformly. Read-only — title-ness is determined by placeholder type at Add time, not as a settable property.

opacity.description: fill opacity (0.0 - 1.0). Requires a fill to attach to — opacity alone (without fill/gradient/pattern) has no effect in OOXML.

font.latin.description: Latin-script font slot only (a:latin). Use to target ASCII/European text without overwriting CJK / complex-script slots.
font.latin.readback: typeface (only emitted when it differs from the bare 'font' slot)

font.ea.description: East-Asian font slot (a:ea) — Chinese / Japanese / Korean text.
font.ea.readback: typeface (only emitted when it differs from the bare 'font' slot)

font.cs.description: Complex-script font slot (a:cs) — Arabic / Hebrew / Thai etc.

direction.description: paragraph reading direction (a:pPr rtl). Use 'rtl' for Arabic / Hebrew layouts.
direction.readback: rtl (ltr is the default and is suppressed; clearing direction removes the attribute)

strike.description: strikethrough on shape text. Single and double are distinct OOXML tokens (sngStrike / dblStrike); Word splits these into `strike` + `dstrike`, PowerPoint folds both into one attribute.
strike.readback: single | double | none. Boolean `true` on add/set is accepted as an alias for `single`.

cap.description: letter-case rendering mode for shape text (rPr/cap).

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag on first run rPr (drawingML rPr/@lang).

kern.description: minimum kerning size in 1/100 pt (drawingML rPr/@kern). Get surfaces the raw integer via long-tail rPr attribute readback.

autoFit.description: text body auto-fit mode. 'normal' shrinks text to fit; 'shape' resizes the shape to fit text; 'none' overflows. Aliases on Set: true/shrink → normal, resize → shape, false → none.

lineSpacing.description: line spacing for shape paragraphs (multiplier or pt).

gradient.description: gradient fill spec. Linear: 'C1-C2[-ANGLE]' or 'LINEAR;C1;C2;ANGLE'. Radial: 'radial:C1-C2[-FOCUS]' (focus: tl/tr/bl/br/center). Path: 'path:C1-C2[-FOCUS]'. Per-stop position: 'C@PCT' (e.g. 'FF0000@0-0000FF@100').
gradient.readback: linear: 'linear;C1;C2;ANGLE' (semicolon-separated, degree integer). radial/path: 'radial:C1-C2-FOCUS' / 'path:C1-C2-FOCUS'. When gradient is present, 'fill' reads back as 'gradient' unless a solidFill also exists.

pattern.description: pattern fill: 'preset' or 'preset:fg' or 'preset:fg:bg' (defaults: fg=000000, bg=FFFFFF).

image.description: image (blip) fill: path to a local image file used as the shape fill.
image.readback: "true" when shape has an image (blipFill) fill

lineDash.description: outline dash pattern (drawingML prstDash). Also reachable as the third segment of the compound line='color:width:style' form.
lineDash.readback: canonical OOXML prstDash token (solid | dot | dash | dashDot | lgDash | lgDashDot | lgDashDotDot | sysDot | sysDash | sysDashDot | sysDashDotDot). 'longdash'/'longdashdot' are accepted on input as aliases for lgDash/lgDashDot. 'dashDotDot' has no native enum member; it is accepted as an alias for sysDashDotDot (Get readback returns sysDashDotDot).

lineCap.description: line end cap style (drawingML <a:ln @cap>). Affects how the stroke terminates at endpoints (and dash gaps for dashed strokes).

lineJoin.description: line join style at shape corners (drawingML <a:ln> child <a:round/> | <a:bevel/> | <a:miter/>).

cmpd.description: compound line style (drawingML <a:ln @cmpd>) for double/triple/asymmetric strokes.
cmpd.readback: canonical OOXML token (sng | dbl | thickThin | thinThick | tri)

lineAlign.description: stroke alignment relative to the path (drawingML <a:ln @algn>). 'ctr' centers the stroke on the path; 'in' insets it inside the shape boundary.

headEnd.description: arrowhead at the line's start (drawingML <a:headEnd type=...>). Supported on any outline (shape or connector), not connector-only.
headEnd.readback: canonical OOXML token (none | triangle | stealth | diamond | oval | arrow)

tailEnd.description: arrowhead at the line's end (drawingML <a:tailEnd type=...>). Supported on any outline (shape or connector).
tailEnd.readback: canonical OOXML token (none | triangle | stealth | diamond | oval | arrow)

link.description: hyperlink URL or anchor for shape click action.

tooltip.description: tooltip / screen-tip text for hyperlink. Applied together with `link` in a single set/add call; standalone tooltip without link is not supported (no hyperlink relationship to attach to). Set-side may update an existing hyperlink's tooltip in-place without re-supplying link.

effective.direction.description: resolved reading direction inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'direction' is set directly on the shape.

effective.size.description: resolved font size inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'size' is set directly on the shape.

effective.font.description: resolved font name inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'font' is set directly on the shape.

effective.color.description: resolved text color inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'color' is set directly on the shape.

effective.bold.description: resolved bold inherited from placeholder→layout→master→presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'bold' is set directly on the shape.

effective.font.ea.description: resolved East Asian font via cascade.

effective.font.cs.description: resolved complex script font via cascade.

effective.size.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.size.

effective.font.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.font.

effective.font.latin.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.font.latin.

effective.font.ea.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.font.ea.

effective.font.cs.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.font.cs.

effective.color.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.color.

effective.bold.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.bold.

effective.italic.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.italic.

effective.underline.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.underline.

effective.strike.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.strike.

effective.align.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.align.

effective.lineSpacing.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.lineSpacing.

effective.spaceBefore.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.spaceBefore.

effective.spaceAfter.src.description: path of the cascade layer that wrote effective.spaceAfter.

id.description: OOXML shape id; source of the @id in the stable path /shape[@id=ID].

zorder.description: 1-based z-order in slide shape tree. On add/set, repositions the shape within the shape tree (1 = back).

bevel.description: 3-D top bevel descriptor (sp3d.bevelT). Form: 'preset[-width[-height]]' with width/height in points; height defaults to width. Preset values: angle, artDeco, circle, convex, coolSlant, cross, divot, hardEdge, relaxedInset, riblet, slope, softRound. Example: 'circle-6-6'.
bevel.readback: 'preset' alone, or 'preset-widthPt-heightPt' when non-default sizing was written. Surfaces when sp3d.bevelT is present.

bevelBottom.description: 3-D bottom bevel descriptor (sp3d.bevelB). Same grammar as 'bevel'.

depth.description: 3-D extrusion height (sp3d @extrusionH). Accepts the canonical length input forms — bare number is points, also accepts pt/cm/in/px/emu suffix. 'none' or '0' clears.

lighting.description: 3-D scene lighting rig name (scene3d.lightRig @rig). OOXML preset rig values: threePt, balanced, soft, harsh, flood, contrasting, morning, sunrise, sunset, chilly, freezing, flat, twoPt, glow, brightRoom.

material.description: 3-D preset material (sp3d.prstMaterial). Accepted tokens (case-insensitive): clear, darkEdge (alias dkEdge), flat, matte, metal, plastic, powder, softEdge, softMetal, translucentPowder, warmMatte, wireframe (alias wire).

reflection.description: reflection effect. Accepts 'true' / 'tight' / 'half' / 'full' to enable a reflection of varying length, or 'none' to clear.
reflection.readback: tight | half | full (mapped from a:reflection @endPos: <70000=tight, <95000=half, else=full).

shadow.description: outer shadow. Pass a color (e.g. '000000') or 'true' (defaults to black). Routed to text-level rPr for text-only shapes.
shadow.readback: compound '#RRGGBBAA-blurPt-angleDeg-distPt-opacityPct' (e.g. '#00000066-4-45-3-40'). Color is CSS-form 8-digit hex with leading # (alpha last); blur, distance in pt; angle in degrees; opacity in percent (0-100).

glow.description: glow effect. Pass a color (e.g. '4472C4') or 'true' (defaults to accent blue).
glow.readback: compound '#RRGGBBAA-radiusPt-opacityPct' (e.g. '#4472C4BF-8-75'). Color is CSS-form 8-digit hex with leading # (alpha last); radius in pt; opacity in percent.

lineOpacity.description: shape outline alpha as fraction (0..1). Surfaces when the outline carries an a:alpha child.

x.description: x in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.

y.description: y in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.

width.description: width in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.

height.description: height in EMU/length form (e.g. 2cm). pptx absolute positioning.
